data Nat { .zero, .succ(Nat) }
fn add(n: Nat, m: Nat): produce Nat / {} := match n { .zero => produce m, .succ(let n) => let next = Nat.succ(m) in add(n, next) }
---
add : (Nat, Nat) -> produce Nat / {}
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
data Nat { .zero, .succ(Nat) }
fn even(n: Nat): produce Bool / {} := match n { .zero => Bool.true, .succ(let n) => odd(n) }
fn odd(n: Nat): produce Bool / {} := match n { .zero => Bool.false, .succ(let n) => even(n) }
---
even : (Nat) -> produce Bool / {}
odd : (Nat) -> produce Bool / {}
